reasoning: The control CA-7-f focuses on continuous monitoring and response actions to address results. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that audit logging is enabled to capture changes to critical resources such as NetworkPolicies. Additionally, admission controllers can be configured to log and potentially alert on changes to network configurations. Monitoring tools can be integrated to alert on specific changes to NetworkPolicies, similar to cloud monitoring of network ACLs and route tables.
title: Continuous Monitoring - Response actions to address results...
